title: ficaria verna subsp. pumila
intro: Ficaria verna subsp. pumila, also known as dwarf celandine, is a perennial plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver health. Ficaria verna subsp. pumila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate certain health issues.
